name: ESPHome + Arduino + Wokwi
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y mosquitto wget curl unzip && pip install --upgrade pip && pip install esphome platformio && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/arduino/arduino-cli/master/install.sh | sh -s -- -b /usr/local/bin && wget -qO- https://wokwi.com/cli/install.sh | bash && sudo ln -sf "$HOME/.wokwi/bin/wokwi-cli" /usr/local/bin/wokwi-cli
